description_long: This object is a large, menacing blade with a highly stylized, jagged edge and a pronounced curve, reminiscent of a fantasy or combat sword. The blade features several aggressive, angular protrusions along its spine, giving it a serrated and intimidating appearance. The handle is short, slightly curved, and appears to be ergonomically shaped for a secure grip, ending in a rounded pommel. The entire object is a uniform dark color, likely black or very dark gray, with a matte or semi-gloss finish that absorbs most light. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, and the design is utilitarian with no decorative elements. The overall silhouette is striking and would stand out in any urban or fantasy setting.
description: A large, jagged, curved black blade with angular protrusions and a short, curved handle. The design is aggressive and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full jagged, curved blade profile and the short, curved handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view, revealing the blade's thinness and sharp, pointed tip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the jagged blade and handle curvature seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again showing the blade's thin profile and pointed tip.
attribute_handle_design: short, curved, smooth, rounded pommel, no visible wrapping or texture
